name: Mock Caviar
recipeIngredient: 2 small cans chopped ripe olives or
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olives, anchovies, salad oil, lemon juice, sour cream, onions, and eggs in a bowl.
2. Cover and chill the mixture until ready to serve.
When ready to serve:
3. Line a chilled serving dish with lettuce leaves.
4. Pile the olive mixture onto the lettuce.
5. Top with sour cream and sprinkle with green onion.
